utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , did I not mention ? Carl is a guy I hired to be my identical twin for a medical research project .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know sometimes the good ideas are just right in front of you , are not they ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_sometimes the good ideas are just right in front of you

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay , I know it sounds crazy , but I think it might work . You know ? The only problem is , Carl acting is ...

emotion_cause.span: 3_I know it sounds crazy , but I think it might work . You know ? The only problem is , Carl acting is ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , he is the reason I did not get that big Minute Maid commercial a couple of years ago remember ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_he is the reason I did not get that big Minute Maid commercial a couple of years ago

utterances.speaker: Carl
utterances.text: Hey , uh can I get a little piece of that cake ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Pizza ! ! We like Pizza ! ! Get out ! ! !
